name: ChatBox

slots.name: composerAttachButton
slots.description:
Attach button. Pass `null` to hide just the button while keeping the rest of
the attachment pipeline (drag/drop, paste). Use `features.attachments: false`
to disable attachments entirely.

slots.name: composerAttachmentList
slots.description: The pending-attachment preview list.

slots.name: composerHelperText
slots.description: The helper / disclaimer text below the input.

slots.name: composerInput
slots.description: The auto-resizing text input.

slots.name: composerRoot
slots.description:
Styled root of `<ChatComposer>` (wrapper-only); the default attach/input/send/
toolbar render inside it.

slots.name: composerSendButton
slots.description: Send button. Pass `null` to hide it; the form still submits on Enter.

slots.name: composerToolbar
slots.description: The composer toolbar (button row).

slots.name: conversationHeader
slots.description: The header bar rendered above the message list.

slots.name: conversationHeaderActions
slots.description: The actions area on the trailing side of the header.

slots.name: conversationHeaderInfo
slots.description: The title + subtitle group inside the header.

slots.name: conversationList
slots.description: The conversation-list sidebar component.

slots.name: conversationRoot
slots.description:
Styled root of `<ChatConversation>` (wrapper-only); the default header,
message list and composer continue to render inside it.

slots.name: conversationsPane
slots.description: Container for the conversation-list sidebar (or drawer on narrow widths).

slots.name: conversationSubtitle
slots.description: The conversation subtitle element (participants, status, etc.).

slots.name: conversationTitle
slots.description: The conversation title element.

slots.name: dateDivider
slots.description:
The date separator rendered between message groups. Only rendered when
`features.dateDivider` is enabled. Pass `null` to hide it.

slots.name: emptyState
slots.description: Custom content rendered when the thread has no messages.

slots.name: layout
slots.description: Wrapper that arranges the conversations pane and the thread pane.

slots.name: messageActions
slots.description:
Actions row component (receives `{ messageId }`). Pass `null` to hide
actions entirely; omit to render only the declarative `extraActions` from
`slotProps.messageActions` if provided.

slots.name: messageAuthorName
slots.description:
Author name label rendered by the group wrapper (default variant: above the
bubble; compact variant: inside the message grid). Pass `null` to hide.

slots.name: messageAvatar
slots.description:
Avatar component. Pass `null` to hide the avatar entirely and drop the
reserved avatar grid track.

slots.name: messageContent
slots.description: The message bubble component.

slots.name: messageError
slots.description:
Error card shown under the bubble when the message status is `error`.
Pass `null` to hide the error surface entirely (no component is mounted).

slots.name: messageGroup
slots.description: The per-author group wrapper around consecutive messages.

slots.name: messageInlineMeta
slots.description: Inline meta rendered inside the bubble (default variant). Pass `null` to hide.

slots.name: messageList
slots.description:
Styled scrollable root element of `<ChatMessageList>` (wrapper-only). The
default message rows render inside it, so a plain element such as `'section'`
wraps the list rather than replacing it.

slots.name: messageMeta
slots.description: External meta (compact variant). Pass `null` to hide.

slots.name: messageRoot
slots.description:
Styled root of `<ChatMessage>` (wrapper-only); the default avatar/content/meta
tree still renders inside it.

slots.name: root
slots.description: The outermost `ChatBox` container element.

slots.name: scrollToBottom
slots.description: The floating scroll-to-bottom button.

slots.name: streamingIndicator
slots.description:
The animated dots shown while an assistant response is in flight: as a
trailing row while waiting for the response to start, then inside the
assistant bubble while it streams. Controlled by
`features.streamingIndicator` (`'auto'` by default). Pass `null` to hide it.

slots.name: suggestions
slots.description: The prompt-suggestion chips.

slots.name: threadPane
slots.description: Container for the active thread — the message list plus the composer.

slots.name: typingIndicator
slots.description: The animated typing indicator shown while the assistant responds.

slots.name: unreadMarker
slots.description:
The "new messages" marker. Only rendered when `features.unreadMarker` is
enabled. Pass `null` to hide it.

classes.description: Styles applied to the root element.
Styles applied to the layout element.
Styles applied to the conversations pane element.
Styles applied to the thread pane element.
